transcript_facts:
- [Findings] so john is a 55-year-old male with a past medical history significant for anxiety and epilepsy who presents with an abnormal lab finding .
- [Findings] okay , yeah , i had gone through your hemoglobin a1c's and you know , they were borderline in the past but-
- [Findings] and all right , let's go ahead do a quick physical exam . hey , dragon , show me the vitals . so looking here at your vital signs today , um , they look really good .
- [Findings] okay , so on physical examination , you know , everything seems to look really good , um lungs are nice and clear , your heart's at a regular rate and rhythm .
- [Findings] hey , dragon , show me the glucose . okay , so yeah , you know i know that they just checked your blood sugar now and it was 162 and you know , what ... you know , did you eat before this ?
- [Findings] hey , dragon , show me the diabetes labs . yeah , so your hemoglobin a1c here is is 8 , you know last time we had seen it , it was about 6 and we had n't put you on medications so , um , i think it's something we'll have to talk about , okay ?
- [Findings] i'm gon na go ahead and order hemoglobin a1c for the future okay ?
- [History of Present Illness] so , john , um , i , uh , was notified by the emergency room that you , um , had a really high blood sugar and you were in there with , uh ... they had to treat you for that , what was going on ?
- [History of Present Illness] okay , did they put you on medication ?
- [History of Present Illness] i think they have here metformin ? all right , um , and , um , in terms of your anxiety , i'm sure that this did n't help much-
- [History of Present Illness] um , how about your epilepsy , any seizures recently ?
- [History of Present Illness] any chest pain , shortness of breath , nausea , vomiting , dizzy- dizziness ? okay , any recent fever , chills ?
- [History of Present Illness] you do have some trace pitting edema to your lower extremities so what that means is that it looks like you might be retaining a little bit of fluid-
- [History of Present Illness] um for your second problem , your anxiety . it sounds like you know you might have , you know , some issues leading into the winter .
- [History of Present Illness] okay , all right , and so for your last ish issue , your- your epilepsy , you know , i think you saw your neurologist about three months ago , you must be due to see her again some time soon ?
- [Plan] um , so let's just talk a little bit about my assessment and my plan for you so for your first problem , this newly diagnosed diabetes . um , you know , i want to continue on the metformin 500 mg twice a day .
- [Plan] and we'll just continue you on the keppra , okay ?
